summary: Iteration 2 frontend smoke test PASSED. All requested UI flows work end-to-end: login page, admin/operator quick chips, admin & operator login with attestation dialog skip, sidebar nav (incl. role-based visibility), all 11 main page routes render without React error boundary or white screen, EN<->HI i18n toggle on login changes content, and logout returns to /login.
critical_code_review_comments: Layout.jsx: Suppliers/AdminUsers/Admin Settings/Login Attestations are nested under a collapsible 'Settings' group (not top-level). Working as designed but worth noting for QA discoverability.
Login.jsx defaults email/password fields to 'admin'/'admin123' as a dev convenience. Consider removing pre-filled credentials for production builds.
LoginAttestationDialog appears on every login (mobile enforced, desktop allows Skip). Desktop UX could surface this as a one-time consent rather than per-login.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend smoke is GREEN on https://fetch-and-build.preview.emergentagent.com. Login form has data-testid='login-form', 'login-email', 'login-password', 'login-submit', 'quick-admin', 'quick-user'. Language switcher uses data-testid='lang-btn-en' and 'lang-btn-hi' (Hindi label is the devanagari 'हिं', not 'HI'). After successful login a LoginAttestationDialog appears — on desktop click the 'Skip' button to proceed to dashboard. Sidebar nav testids: nav-dashboard, nav-orders, nav-dispatch, nav-purchase-center (admin only), nav-dispatch-ledger, nav-daily-report, then a collapsible 'Settings' group [nav-settings-group] containing nav-customers, nav-products, nav-suppliers (admin), nav-price-lists (admin), nav-admin-users (admin), nav-admin-settings (admin), nav-login-audit (admin). Logout button: data-testid='logout-btn'. Operator role correctly hides all 6 admin-only entries. All 11 routed pages (Dashboard, Orders, Dispatch, DispatchLedger, DailyReport, Customers, Products, Suppliers, AdminUsers, AdminSettings, LoginAttestations) render without React error boundary. No backend bugs surfaced from UI exercise.
tests_executed: Login page loads with quick-demo chips for admin & operator — PASS
EN<->HI language toggle (Open the line. <-> लाइन शुरू करें।) — PASS
Admin sees all 7 admin-only nav entries (purchase-center, suppliers, price-lists, admin-users, admin-settings, login-audit) — PASS
Operator does NOT see any of the 6 admin-only nav entries — PASS
All 11 protected routes render non-empty <main> content with no error boundary — PASS
Logout from sidebar returns to /login for both admin and operator — PASS
